rows.label: qev025110_MSG0001
rows.name: Um... Are you [ST:playername ] by any chance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Just as I thought. You're the "reliable collaborator"
Aqual was talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sorry for the suddenness.
I'm a BLADE just like you,
and I'm a colleague of Aqual's.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0004
rows.name:
His whereabouts have become unknown...
And I was searching for you, thinking
you might know something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0011
rows.name: State that you do not know Aqual's whereabouts.

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him back if Aqual is not in NLA.

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0005
rows.name: I see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well, you see, just when I thought he returned from
the Nightglow Forest, he rushed out of the city
with a changed look on his face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0007
rows.name:
Just when I thought he returned from the Nightglow Forest,
he rushed out of the city with a changed look on his face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask where Aqual disappeared.

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0040
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0041
rows.name: Offer to help search for Aqual.

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0008
rows.name:
It seems his communication was lost
near Kevin Ridge in the Valley of Oblivion, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0009
rows.name:
Could it be...
Are you planning to go save him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0010
rows.name: ...You'll go save him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0011
rows.name:
Communication from Aqual was lost
near Kevin Ridge in the Valley of Oblivion, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Thank you. With my light equipment,
I was troubled because I couldn't even go outside to search.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0014
rows.name:
This really... helps a lot.
Please save that scatterbrain...
Please save our comrade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thank you. You really are the "reliable collaborator"
Aqual said you were...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0016
rows.name:
Communication from Aqual was lost
near Kevin Ridge in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you go now, you might make it in time.
Please... you have to save him no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0018
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... Thank goodness you returned safely!
Did you find any traces of Aqual?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Eh!!
He was killed by a pizza shop owner named Powell!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0020
rows.name: And... you took care of that man?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0021
rows.name:
...I see... Then the case Aqual was pursuing
has been resolved...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0022
rows.name:
He was pursuing this case for so long...
I think he was somewhat rewarded, thanks to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0023
rows.name:
Thank you... I'm sure he is grateful in heaven, too.
Please, don't hesitate to accept this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0024
rows.name:
I was always made to clean up the messes
of him acting on his own and rushing ahead,
...but I was envious of him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0025
rows.name:
Aqual, who wasn't bound by Earthling ties,
stayed true to his sense of justice, and just kept moving forward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0026
rows.name: I... will never forget this brave BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0027
rows.name: Um... Are you [ST:playername ] by any chance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0028
rows.name: ...Just as I thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0029
rows.name:
My name is Jim, a colleague of Aqual's.
I've been entrusted with a message from him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0030
rows.name:
He said to come to Kevin Ridge in the Valley of Oblivion
right away... What on earth is he planning to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0050
rows.name: Tell

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell him that he is pursuing the culprit
who killed Yuyu.

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0060
rows.name: Don't Tell

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0061
rows.name: Keep it a secret.

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0031
rows.name:
His girlfriend was killed...
So that's why he had such a brooding look on his face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0032
rows.name:
Guh...
That Aqual... taking it all on himself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey... Please, from me as well.
Save Aqual. Probably...
you are the only one who can save him right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0034
rows.name:
Tight-lipped, aren't you...
Just as Aqual said, you seem like someone who can be trusted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Aqual didn't tell me anything either.
He just said that he had to settle things on this mountain himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0036
rows.name:
I don't know what happened, but...
Please, you have to save him no matter what.
I'm counting on you, he's an important comrade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0071
rows.name: Declare absolutely that you will save him.

rows.label: qev025110_JNK0080
rows.name: Cautious

rows.label: qev025110_SEL0081
rows.name: Answer that you cannot make a firm promise.

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0037
rows.name:
Very reliable.
As expected of Aqual's "reliable collaborator."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0038
rows.name:
Well then, I leave cleaning up that reckless Ma-non's mess
to you this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0039
rows.name: You're quite a cautious person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Well, to hold back that reckless Ma-non,
someone calm like you might be better for the job...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0041
rows.name:
I'll leave Aqual to you, then!
If he runs wild like always,
make sure you stop him firmly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0042
rows.name:
Aqual said to come to Kevin Ridge
in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025110_MSG0043
rows.name:
This is a job that only you can do.
Please, save him.[ST:wait ]
